description.unified: Deals ??? Magic DMG to an enemy and recovers HP equal to 25% of the damage dealt. Increases own ATK by [(added) 4%] for [(added) 15sec]. This ATK increase effect stacks up to [(added) 6] times. [(removed) ignores enemy DEF]
Moves to the rearmost enemy and deals ??? Magic DMG to the target and nearby enemies. Increases Magic DMG taken by [30%->20%] and reduces Status Resistance by [(added) 320] for [10 sec -> 5sec].
Deals ??? Magic DMG to enemies within range 4 times. While casting, the caster is immune to status effects and all damage taken is reduced by [(added) 60%].

Upon killing an enemy, reduces the Cooldown of all skills by 30% and gains 1 stacks of [Harvest]. [Harvest]: Increases ATK by [?->80*(multiplier)], stacking up to [?->10] times. [(removed) duration 12 sec]

IV.unified: When [Harvest] is triggered, restores [1 orb->1000] of your Mana.

dark.unified: Cooldown is reduced by [(added) 2 sec]. [(removed) Ignores enemy Block.]

light.unified: Damage increases by [(added) 50%]. [(removed) Mana cost is reduced by 1.]

dark.unified: Mana cost increases by [1->2000], but after using a skill, if there are nearby enemies, additionally uses [Absorbing Blow].

light.unified: Damage is reduced by [(added) 30%], but the number of hits is doubled. [(removed) DMG is increased by 40%.]

dark.unified: Mana cost increases by [(added) 1000], but triggers [Harvest] once. [(removed) DMG taken is reduced by 50% while skill is in use.]

light.unified: Increases Mana recovery per second by [50%->{1}%] per stack.

dark.unified: If stacks are 6 or more, cooldown is additionally reduced by 1 sec every second.

description.unified: [Absorbing Blow] increases DMG by {0}% and resets its Cooldown upon killing an enemy. [(removed) ATK increased by 20% for 10 sec, stacks 3 times]
[Devil's Prom] Reduces Mana Cost by 1 and increases DMG by {0}%. [(removed) Crit DMG increased by {0}%]

dark.unified: When attacking with a skill, increases Epis’s Attack by [(added) 4%] and Armor Penetration by [(added) 4%]. This effect stacks up to [(added) 5] times. [(removed) decrease M.DEF by 20%, ATK rises 2% per hit, max 10 stacks]

description.unified: On hit, has a 25% chance to deal additional Magic DMG equal to {0}% of ATK and increase your Attack by {1}%. The Attack increase stacks up to [10->5] times.

Summons the Soul of the Seductress, Guillotine for 8sec, increasing own ATK by 40%. During the duration, Normal and Skill attacks have a 20% chance to deal ??? M.DMG. This effect gains an additional [(added) {4}] Magic DEF Penetration, and triggers with a 100% chance when [Absorbing Blow] hits. [(removed) ignores DEF]

1.from: Activation chance is changed to 30%, and DMG is increased by 50%.
1.unified: Increases DMG by 50%. [(removed) Activation chance changed to 30%]

2.from: The M.DMG now ignores Block, and increases the M.DMG the hit enemy takes by 30% for 7 sec.
2.unified: Changes activation chance to [(added) 40%]. [(removed) M.DMG ignores Block, increases M.DMG taken by 30% for 7 sec]
